page: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is a memory-optimized server instance configured with 48 vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor with 24 physical cores and hyper-threading, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation. The processor architecture includes a 260 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache. It does not include bundled local storage or GPUs, and comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the n4-highmem-48 demonstrates strong performance in memory-intensive and multi-threaded operations. Large-block uncached memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 254.09 GB/sec for read-only operations and 113.1 GB/sec for write operations, both placing in the top 25% tier. Multi-core performance is also a highlight, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 16867.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 58640.65. The hardware features advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and Advanced Vector Extensions, which contribute to strong results in Passmark extended instructions and encryption tests.

With 8 GB of RAM per vCPU, this instance offers a high resource density suitable for memory-bound workloads. It performs exceptionally well in database operations, scoring 24009.26 on Passmark database tests, and static web serving throughput at 67.89 GB/sec. While single-core performance and Redis SET operations align with average tiers, the high memory capacity and strong multi-threaded capabilities make it qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale enterprise applications, database hosting, and medium-sized LLM prompt processing without requiring expensive GPU acceleration.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance configured with 48 vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM, yielding 8 GB of memory per core. Powered by an Intel processor with 24 physical cores and a 260 MB L3 cache, this instance features dedicated CPU allocation but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmarks indicate strong multi-core and memory performance, particularly in large-block uncached memory write and read operations. It also excels in Passmark database operations and static web serving throughput. Supported by Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512, the instance is highly capable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The n4-highmem-48 is best suited for database hosting, multi-threaded data processing, and memory-bound applications requiring high resource density without local storage needs.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and an Intel x86_64 architecture, delivering strong multi-core performance and high memory bandwidth.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is an Intel-powered memory-optimized server with 48 vCPUs and 384 GB RAM, built for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring high memory bandwidth, dedicated Intel cores, and advanced matrix extensions for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs and 384 GB RAM providing 8 GB of memory per core
Dedicated Intel x86_64 processor with 24 physical cores and 260 MB L3 cache
Strong large-block memory bandwidth and multi-core benchmark performance
Supports Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets for accelerated computing
Optimized for database operations, web serving, and memory-intensive workloads
